description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a single side-hinged door featuring a white panel. The front of the cabinet reveals an open compartment with a metal rack, likely for holding bottles or similar items, and a lower shelf for additional storage. The door is attached on the left side and swings outward, providing access to the interior. The top, sides, and back are solid wood, with no visible handles or decorative elements. The construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a modern, utilitarian design. The interior is partially visible, showing a metal rack and an empty shelf, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, shops, or communal spaces.
description: A dark brown wooden cabinet with a white side-hinged door, featuring an open compartment with a metal rack and a lower shelf. Its modern, boxy design is functional and sturdy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door, metal rack, and lower shelf inside the cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wooden surface and the open white-panel door extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wooden back and the open door visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the closed wooden surface and the open door extending to the right.
